Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 302}I never expected anything like this to happen to someone from this school...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 302}That girl who collapsed is in my class...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 302}I heard she would run away from home and stay out all night.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 302}Maybe she got caught up in something bad...[n]{f 1 1}
